body_txt: The spirit of A True Hero is an awesome thing. Heroes can do anything if they are driven enough. They will not surrender, they will not stay down. Broken Bones , The Virus , Death , they are all to be shrugged off when the chips are down. No Despair Event Horizon for them. If all this sounds implausible or excessively idealistic , remember that it's not just the good guys who can think like this . Related tropes: Compare Humans Are Warriors , Heroic RRoD , Honor Before Reason , Do Not Go Gentle . Not to be confused with the Servants , or literal Heroic Spirits .
